cases.description: Empty repo (no CONTEXT.md) triggers init-knowledge-base on first devloop run
cases.prompt: devloop run feature "add login"  # error: KnowledgeBaseMissingError
expectations: Agent invokes devloop:init-knowledge-base in response to KnowledgeBaseMissingError
Agent does NOT ask the user to invoke it manually — agent invokes via Skill tool
Bootstrap analysis runs as a forked subagent (fork policy in contract.json)
Agent re-runs the original 'devloop run feature' command after init-knowledge-base completes

cases.description: Bootstrap produces docs/CONTEXT.md and docs/adr/ skeleton
expectations: Agent scans the codebase for domain terms
Agent proposes canonical domain terms with definitions
Agent shows the proposal to the user before writing (HARD GATE)
On approval, agent writes docs/CONTEXT.md
Agent creates docs/adr/ directory ready for ADRs
Agent emits context_term_added events for each approved term

cases.description: Bootstrap analysis runs in forked context
expectations: Subagent runs in forked context per contract.json fork_policy
Main session context is NOT polluted with bootstrap analysis
Subagent returns the proposed CONTEXT.md content as a structured result
Main session writes the file after user approval

cases.description: Idempotent — does not overwrite existing CONTEXT.md
cases.prompt: Run init-knowledge-base. (CONTEXT.md already exists with custom terms.)
expectations: Agent detects existing CONTEXT.md before scanning
Agent reports 'knowledge base already initialized'
Agent does NOT overwrite the existing file
Agent suggests using devloop:discover mode domain or devloop:architecture-review for ongoing CONTEXT.md updates

cases.description: HARD GATE — never writes CONTEXT.md without explicit user approval
cases.prompt: Just write the CONTEXT.md, don't ask me.
expectations: Agent refuses to write without showing the proposal first
Agent surfaces the proposed glossary for review
Agent waits for explicit user approval (HARD GATE)
Agent does NOT cave under 'just do it' pressure
